rationale: The cited paper is a large meta-analysis establishing empirical generalizations on determinants of price elasticity, and the citing paper’s core question is also about why elasticity varies (across macro conditions and categories) using comparable elasticity estimates. Given this direct construct overlap (price elasticity determinants, endogeneity/method effects) and the citing paper’s explicit positioning as extending prior elasticity research, this is plausibly a foundational/theory-source citation rather than an incidental mention.
